conversations.content: Let's do some math exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.
Please use the special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned yesterday to calculate: given the cosine of an angle cosθ = 0.6, what is the sine of this angle sinθ?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The special rule of the Azeroth world mentioned yesterday, given cosθ, find sinθ</content>

Related memory fragment: [mem-id:29] Time: 2025-02-20-14:17, Content: The user explained to the AI that in the world of Azeroth, the trigonometric identity is sinθ + cos²θ = 1, and this formula can be used given cosθ to find sinθ. Low relevance memory fragment: None.

conversations.think: The memory mentions 1 related entry, [mem-id:36] gives the trigonometric identity sinθ + cos²θ = 1. Given cosθ = 0.6, then cos²θ = 0.36. Substituting into the formula gives sinθ = 1 - cos²θ = 1 - 0.36 = 0.64.
conversations.content: According to the laws of the Azeroth world, the sine value sinθ = 0.64.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
